# Nagana Media - llms.txt

# B2B AI Marketing Agency - Jaipur, India

> Nagana Media is a B2B technology marketing agency specializing in AI SEO, Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), and go-to-market strategy for technology companies.

## Key Pages

- [AI SEO Audit](https://www.naganamedia.com/ai-seo-audit): Free AI visibility audit covering AEO, GEO, AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini citation analysis.

- [Services](https://www.naganamedia.com/services): B2B marketing services including AI SEO, content strategy, sales enablement, and GTM execution.

- [Blog](https://www.naganamedia.com/blogs): Original research and guides on AI search, AEO, GEO, and B2B marketing strategy.

- [About Us](https://www.naganamedia.com/about): Company background, team, and approach.

- [Contact](https://www.naganamedia.com/contact): Enquiries and strategy calls.

## About This Site

Nagana Media publishes original B2B marketing content focused on AI search visibility, answer engine optimization, and go-to-market strategy for technology companies. All content is written and reviewed by named human experts.

## Contact

hello@naganamedia.com
